segments.text: To the chief musician; with stringed instruments. A Maskil of David, when the Ziphites went and said to Saul, 'David is hiding among us.'
Save me, O God, by your name, and vindicate me by your might.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Hear my prayer, O God; give ear to the words of my mouth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For strangers have risen against me; ruthless men seek my life; they do not set God before themselves.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Behold, God is my helper; the Lord is the upholder of my life.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: mine helpers: Heb. those that observe me

segments.text: He will return the evil to my enemies; in your faithfulness put an end to them.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: With a freewill offering I will sacrifice to you; I will give thanks to your name, O Lord, for it is good.
segments.speaker: David
